articles.author: Bloomberg News
articles.title: US Stocks Set to Finish Best Quarter in Six Years: Markets Wrap
articles.description: US index futures steadied on the last day of a quarter that looks set to be the S&P 500’s best in six years. The dollar climbed as the yen slid to its weakest level since 1986.
articles.content:
(Bloomberg) US index futures steadied on the last day of a quarter that looks set to be the S&P 500s best in six years. The dollar climbed as the yen slid to its weakest level since 1986.

articles.title: China's factory activity expands in June with boost from tech exports
articles.description: China says its factory activity picked up pace in June
articles.content:
HONG KONG -- HONG KONG (AP) Chinas factory activity picked up pace in June, an official survey showed Tuesday, as demand for artificial intelligence hardware made exports robust.
